name: Flow Time: Active vs Wait per Issue (Top 20)
query:
SELECT
    v_facts.entity_id AS issue_key,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'flow_active_days' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS active_days,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'flow_wait_days' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS wait_days,
    MAX(v_facts.event_end_at) AS closed_at_sort
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code IN ('flow_active_days', 'flow_wait_days')
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{completion_date}}]]
GROUP BY v_facts.entity_id
ORDER BY MAX(v_facts.event_end_at) DESC
LIMIT 20
